Apart from reporting news objectively, CEOAfrica is also into the production of world-class documentaries, media consultations and partnerships, media coverage of seminars, workshops, training, conferences, production of jingles &amp; promos, digital ads, magazine production, web designs, red carpet events, including photo and video production. Our vision is to bring Africa to the world and the world to Africa with the African Union Agenda 2063 of the Africa we want.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 10 years of experience.
	An accountant must be sound in profit and loss, then tax.


Salary
N120,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;their CV to:&nbsp;info@ceoafrica.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Accountant Job at CEOAfrica




        
    

        
        CEOAfrica is a leading online media organization. Apart from reporting news objectively, CEOAfrica is also into the production of world-class documentaries, media consultations and partnerships, media coverage of seminars, workshops, training, conferences, production of jingles & promos, digital ads, magazine production, web designs, red carpet events, including photo and video production. Our vision is to bring Africa to the world and the world to Africa with the African Union Agenda 2063 of the Africa we want.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 10 years of experience.
	An accountant must be sound in profit and loss, then tax.


Salary
N120,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Chartered Accountant Job at the Vault Recruitment
content:
The Vault Recruitment - Our client, a reputable pharmacy, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chartered Accountant
Vacancy Code: FMP002
Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client, a reputable pharmacy, is seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Chartered Accountant to manage the organization’s financial records, ensure compliance with financial regulations, and provide strategic financial insights to support business decisions
	The ideal candidate must possess strong analytical skills, excellent knowledge of accounting standards, and experience in financial reporting and tax compliance.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and reports.
	Manage accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger activities.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Ensure compliance with statutory regulations, tax requirements, and financial policies.
	Conduct financial analysis and provide recommendations for cost control and financial efficiency.
	Coordinate external audits and liaise with auditors when required.
	Manage payroll processing and statutory remittances.
	Monitor budgets and track financial performance against targets.
	Ensure proper documentation and filing of financial transactions.


Requirements


	Must be a Chartered Accountant (ICAN / ACCA certified).
	3–5 years of relevant accounting experience (pharmacy, retail, or FMCG experience is an advantage).
	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	Experience with financial analysis and budgeting.
	Knowledge of Nigerian tax laws and statutory compliance.
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting standards.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Strong analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Salary
N300,000 per month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "CEOAfrica is a leading online media organization. Apart from reporting news objectively, CEOAfrica is also into the production of world-class documentaries, media consultations and partnerships, media coverage of seminars, workshops, training, conferences, production of jingles &amp; promos, digital ads, magazine production, web designs, red carpet events, including photo and video production. Our vision is to bring Africa to the world and the world to Africa with the African Union Agenda 2063 of the Africa we want.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Reporter&nbsp;
Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Must be able to cast news and conduct interviews
	Must be able to do voice over
	Must be able to cover events and conduct Red carpet interviews
	Must be able to cast news
	Must be able to generate revenue.


Salary

Method of Application&nbsp;

Reporter Job at CEOAfrica




        
    

        
        CEOAfrica is a leading online media organization. Apart from reporting news objectively, CEOAfrica is also into the production of world-class documentaries, media consultations and partnerships, media coverage of seminars, workshops, training, conferences, production of jingles & promos, digital ads, magazine production, web designs, red carpet events, including photo and video production. Our vision is to bring Africa to the world and the world to Africa with the African Union Agenda 2063 of the Africa we want.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Reporter 
Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Must be able to cast news and conduct interviews
	Must be able to do voice over
	Must be able to cover events and conduct Red carpet interviews
	Must be able to cast news
	Must be able to generate revenue.


Salary
N100,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
